'''Prouk''' was a [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Akk Guard]] from [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] who liked to [[Gambling/Legends|gamble]] and recently lost 60 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to [[Nick Rostu]] during the start of the [[Summertime War]].

==Biography==
Near the end of the [[Summertime War]], Prouk, the other [[Akk Guard]]s, and [[Kar Vastor]] faced off against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Nick Rostu]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces. During the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Pelek Baw]], Prouk slaughtered many [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] with his [[vibroshield]]s. At the end, Nick Rostu distracted him by firing on him, but he blocked the shots. Meanwhile a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] pushed his [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]] against the Akk Guard and pulled the trigger, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him.

==Appearances==
